subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Muhammad, the Messenger of God, hath indeed wept over thy wrongs, inasmuch as thou didst follow vain desires and turn aside from guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی قد بکی محمد رسول الله من ظلمک بما اتبعت الهوی و اعرضت عن الهدی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to action
